description_long: This rifle features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly black and metallic gray finish. It is equipped with a fixed stock that has a thumbhole and a pistol grip, providing ergonomic support for the user. The rifle includes a long, heavy barrel with an attached suppressor at the muzzle, enhancing its stealth capabilities. A prominent scope is mounted on the top rail, indicating its use for precision shooting at distance. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger assembly. Additional tactical attachments and rails are visible along the fore-end, suggesting modularity for urban operations.
description: A tactical, black and gray rifle with a fixed thumbhole stock, suppressor, scope, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, fixed stock, scope, suppressor, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor, barrel alignment, and scope profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, scope, suppressor, and magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
